title: T-028 — POST /receive-po-line (multi-LP receive + tolerance) (06-b)
prompt:
# T-028 — receive PO line

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-BE-022, §8.2 FR-SC-BE-026 idempotency, §8.2 FR-SC-BE-027 GS1 match
05-WH §7 multi-LP, §7.2 tolerance
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Accept a single receipt row (Multi-LP Q1) and create the GRN row + new LP per 05-WH §6 state machine. Validates qty ≤ ordered + tolerance, idempotent via X-Client-Operation-Id header.

## Implementation contract
1. POST /api/warehouse/scanner/receive-po-line with body Zod `{ po_line_id, product_id, qty, lot_number, expiry_date, catch_weight_kg?, location_id, pallet_id? }`.
2. Idempotency: lookup scanner_audit_log.client_operation_id; if exists return cached envelope.
3. Tolerance check from 05-WH §7.2 config; over-receipt ⇒ 409 SC_PO_OVER_RECEIPT_EXCEEDED.
4. Insert lp + grn_row + audit row in a single transaction.
5. GS1 batch match: if lot_number matches AI 10 from gs1-parser of the scanned barcode, server normalizes to uppercase.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/receive-po-line/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/warehouse-receive.ts [modify]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/receive-po-line.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a PO line ordered 100, received 60, with tolerance 5%, when POST receive-po-line is called with qty=46, then the response is 409 SC_PO_OVER_RECEIPT_EXCEEDED
2. Given the same X-Client-Operation-Id header on two POSTs of qty=20, when the second POST runs, then it returns the cached envelope and no duplicate LP is created
3. Given a successful receive of qty=40, when the response returns 200, then a new lp row exists with qty=40, status='available', a grn_row is linked, and a scanner_audit_log row with scan_type='receive_po' and client_operation_id is recorded

## Test strategy
- RED: write receive-po-line.test.ts asserting tolerance reject + idempotency replay + happy-path artifacts before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/receive-po-line'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow qty=0 (V-SCAN-WO-005-style block)
- Do not skip the transaction wrapping lp+grn_row insert
- Do not let client override org_id or user_id

pipeline_inputs.description: Receive a PO line; create LP + GRN row in one transaction; idempotent via X-Client-Operation-Id and tolerance-checked.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single POST handler validates body, looks up cached idempotent response, enforces 05-WH §7.2 tolerance, then transactionally inserts lp + grn_row + audit row. GS1 batch normalized to uppercase if AI 10 matches.
out_of_scope: Do not implement TO receive here (T-029)
Do not build SCN-020 UI here (T-031)
